'''Beta Fleet''' was led by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==History==
It was supposed to participate in [[Second Battle of Bilbringi|Operation Trinity]] at the [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]]. After jumping in-system, [[Alpha Fleet]] was supposed to transmit the system's weak spots to them and [[Gamma Fleet]]. But the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] launched the [[Mabugat kan]], which crippled several [[HoloNet relay/Legends|HoloNet relay stations]]. Alpha Fleet therefore was unable to send out any transmissions. With strict orders not to jump without the transmission from Alpha, Beta and Gamma Fleet held their positions.

{{Military-stub}}
